ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "plate_app_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the plate appearance session */,
  "home_away" TEXT /* Indicates if the team is home or away */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "umpire" TEXT /* Name of the umpire */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "inning_count" INTEGER /* Total number of innings played */,
  "game_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* ID of the game during which the action occurred */,
  "runner_name" TEXT /* Name of the runner involved in the action */,
  "hole" INTEGER /* The hole number associated with the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., stole, scored, advanced) */,
  "start_base" INTEGER /* Starting base of the runner */,
  "end_base" INTEGER /* Ending base of the runner */,
  "inning" INTEGER /* Inning in which the action occurred */,
  "batter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the batter */,
  "pitcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pitcher */,
  "action_time" TEXT /* Time of the action during the game */,
  "action_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the action (e.g., safe, out) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_actions_runner_name FOREIGN KEY ("runner_name") REFERENCES players ("player_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_actions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the statistics entry */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* ID of the game corresponding to these stats */,
  "runs_added" INTEGER /* Total runs added during the game */,
  "outs_added" INTEGER /* Total outs added during the game */,
  "errors" INTEGER /* Total errors recorded during the game */,
  "home_runs" INTEGER /* Home runs scored by the home team */,
  "away_runs" INTEGER /* Home runs scored by the away team */,
  "home_hits" INTEGER /* Hits by the home team */,
  "away_hits" INTEGER /* Hits by the away team */,
  "home_errors" INTEGER /* Errors by the home team */,
  "away_errors" INTEGER /* Errors by the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "base_states" (
  "base_state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the base state entry */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* ID of the game associated with this entry */,
  "runner_name" TEXT /* Name of the runner whose base state is recorded */,
  "base_state" TEXT /* Base state of the runner (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  "base_out_state" TEXT /* Base out state during the play */,
  "inning" INTEGER /* Inning in which the base state occurred */,
  "pitch_count" INTEGER /* Number of pitches in the at-bat */,
  "outs" INTEGER /* Number of outs when the base state was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("base_state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_base_states_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "player_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "player_height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "player_weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "batting_hand" TEXT /* Batting hand (left, right, switch) */,
  "throwing_hand" TEXT /* Throwing hand (left, right) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plays" (
  "play_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* ID of the game in which the play occurred */,
  "runner_name" TEXT /* Name of the runner involved in the play */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action related to this play */,
  "fielder1" TEXT /* First fielder involved in the play */,
  "fielder2" TEXT /* Second fielder involved in the play */,
  "runs_added" INTEGER /* Total runs added by this play */,
  "inning" INTEGER /* Inning in which the play occurred */,
  "pitch_count" INTEGER /* Number of pitches in the at-bat */,
  "ball_count" INTEGER /* Number of balls in the at-bat */,
  "strike_count" INTEGER /* Number of strikes in the at-bat */,
  "play_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the play */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plays_runner_name FOREIGN KEY ("runner_name") REFERENCES players ("player_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plays_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outs" (
  "out_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each out entry */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* ID of the game associated with this out */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action leading to this out */,
  "outs_added" INTEGER /* Total number of outs recorded */,
  "inning" INTEGER /* Inning in which the out occurred */,
  "out_type" TEXT /* Type of out (e.g., fly out, ground out) */,
  "fielder3" TEXT /* Third fielder involved in the out */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("out_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outs_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES player_actions ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "errors" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error entry */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* ID of the game associated with this error */,
  "fielder" TEXT /* Name of the fielder who committed the error */,
  "error_type" TEXT /* Type of error committed */,
  "base_number" INTEGER /* Base number related to the error */,
  "inning" INTEGER /* Inning in which the error occurred */,
  "error_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the error */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_errors_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_errors_fielder FOREIGN KEY ("fielder") REFERENCES players ("player_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player stat entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player this statistic belongs to */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* ID of the game this statistic pertains to */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Total runs scored by the player in the game */,
  "stolen_bases" INTEGER /* Total stolen bases by the player */,
  "outs" INTEGER /* Total outs recorded for the player */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits */,
  "walks" INTEGER /* Number of walks */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Number of strikeouts */,
  "rbis" INTEGER /* Runs batted in */,
  "batting_average" REAL /* Batting average */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* ID of the game associated with this report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the game, including key events */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was created */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Final score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Final score of the away team */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_reports_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fan_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement entry */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* ID of the game associated with this engagement */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes received during the game */,
  "comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments made during the game */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares of game highlights or stats */,
  "social_media_platform" TEXT /* Platform where engagement occurred (e.g., Twitter, Facebook) */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., live, post-game) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fan_engagement_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., analyst, coach, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with this role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
